problems_encountered.description: API returned 400 Bad Request. The test URI 'https://registry.example.com' was rejected, likely due to validation rules requiring actual registry endpoints.

tool_response_summary: Tool call failed with 400 status code. API rejected the provided URI parameter.
execution_notes: Tool successfully invoked but parameter validation failed. This indicates the tool is functional but requires valid registry URIs. Would need actual registry endpoint to complete successfully.
